title: A16Z announces new $500M gaming fund
summary:
1. Marc Andreessen announced a new $500M fund dedicated to Web3 and AI integration in gaming.
2. The fund will specifically target founders building 'fully on-chain games' (FOCG).
3. Expect a surge in infrastructure projects catering to high-throughput gaming engines.
author: pmarca

title: Ethereum's Dencun Upgrade Goes Live on Mainnet
summary:
1. Ethereum has successfully deployed the highly anticipated Dencun upgrade on the mainnet.
2. The upgrade introduces 'blobs' (EIP-4844) to drastically reduce Layer 2 transaction fees.
3. Early metrics show a 90% drop in gas fees across major rollups like Arbitrum and Optimism.
author: Margaux Nijkerk

title: Vitalik on ZK-Rollups scaling
summary:
1. Vitalik Buterin posted a detailed thread on Farcaster regarding the future of ZK-rollups.
2. He emphasized that 'Type 1 ZK-EVMs' will be the ultimate endgame for Ethereum scaling.
3. Community builders are already shifting resources toward ZK provers over Optimistic models.
author: vitalik.eth

title: Blockchain Capital seeks $700 million for two new funds: Bloomberg
summary: 1. Blockchain Capital could complete the fundraising in five to six months, Bloomberg reported, citing a source familiar with the matter.
author: Timmy Shen

title: OpenAI appears to be poaching Coinbase’s marketing team
summary: 1. Six Coinbase senior marketing executives, including the exchange's former chief marketing officer, have jumped to OpenAI in the past year and a half.
author: Ian Allison

title: Polymarket traders win $37K after Paris weather data glitch, raising suspicion
summary: 1. Ruben Hallali, a meteorologist, told French media outlet BFMTV the sudden temperature fluctuation recorded at a weather station at the Charles de Gaulle Airport was unlikely to be a natural event.
author: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

title: Uzbekistan launches special crypto mining zone with 10-year tax holiday
summary: 1. The initiative seeks to attract investments, create new jobs, and promote the use of renewable energy resources in crypto mining.
author: Danny Park

title: Bitcoin's bull score index just left bear territory. There's a warning attached.
summary: 1. The index has returned to neutral territory, a rare milestone that has historically marked market turning points, but not always correctly.
author: Omkar Godbole

title: FTX sold its Cursor stake for $200,000 in 2023. It would be worth $3 billion today
summary: 1. SpaceX's agreement to acquire AI coding startup Cursor at a $60 billion valuation has retroactively turned a routine bankruptcy asset sale by FTX's estate into one of the largest missed recoveries in crypto history.
author: Shaurya Malwa

title: Crypto sentiment index soars to a 3-month high as Bitcoin holds $77K
summary: 1. Despite the rise, the Crypto Fear & Greed Index score remains stuck in the “Fear” zone, where it has been since Jan.
author: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

title: Apple fixes bug that allowed FBI to read deleted Signal messages
summary: 1. FBI used the flaw to extract readable previews of Signal messages from an iPhone's notification database even after the app was deleted.
author: Cointelegraph by Brian Quarmby

title: MetaMask Co-founder Dan Finlay announces departure from Consensys
summary: 1. Finlay highlighted the launch of Advanced Permissions, which allows dApps to execute multiple transactions on behalf of a MetaMask user.
author: Danny Park

title: India’s app market is booming — but global platforms are capturing most of the gains
summary: 1. Non-gaming apps, led by streaming and AI, are driving growth, even as India's spending per user lags global peers.
author: Jagmeet Singh

title: Shade lands $14M to let creative teams search their video libraries in plain English
summary: 1. Shade has its own filesystem that lets you "stream" files directly to your local drive
author: Ivan Mehta

title: Why AI Agents Are Choosing Crypto for Payments and What It Means for Ethereum
summary: 1. Why AI Agents Are Choosing Crypto for Payments and What It Means for Ethereum
author: u/1stplacelastrunnerup

title: Tesla just increased its spending plan to $25B — here’s where the money is going
summary:
1. Tesla's planned capex for 2026 is three times higher than what the company has historically spent.
2. Its CFO said, as a result, Tesla will have a negative free cash flow the rest of the year.
author: Kirsten Korosec

title: US Government Runs a Bitcoin Node, But Not Mining BTC: US Admiral
summary:
1. The commander of U.S.
2. forces in the Pacific said the military is investigating Bitcoin’s ability to “secure and protect networks.”
author: Sander Lutz

title: OpenAI Launches Workspace Agents Feature in ChatGPT
summary: 1. Codex-powered tools automate reports, code, Slack replies, and other workplace tasks.
author: Jason Nelson

title: Kalshi Fines Meme Coin Candidate Mark Moran, Others for Betting on Their Own Elections
summary:
1. Moran, a candidate running for U.S.
2. Senate in Virginia, previously described self-wagers as “free advertising.”
author: André Beganski

title: Vercel AI SDK adds native Anthropic Tool calling
summary:
1. The Vercel AI SDK repository has a new merged PR that adds native tool calling support for Claude 3.5.
2. This drastically simplifies the code required to build agentic workflows on Next.js.
3. The repo gained 1,200 stars in the last 24 hours, indicating massive developer interest.
author: vercel

title: Crypto billionaire Justin Sun sues Trump family’s World Liberty Financial
summary: 1. Crypto billionaire Justin Sun sues Trump family’s World Liberty Financial
